task_completion.description: Log in to OpenCAD as the Admin User
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile shows Admin or admin@opencad.local).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Person BOLO creation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page titled 'Create BOLO', 'New BOLO', or similar is open, and the BOLO type is set to 'Person'.
The name 'Marcus' is entered in the first name field and 'Holloway' is entered in the last name field (or 'Marcus Holloway' in a combined name field).

task_completion.description: Enter the gender and last known location
task_completion.visual_evidence: The gender field is set to 'Male' and the last known location field contains 'Vinewood Blvd'.

task_completion.description: Enter the physical description and clothing details
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description or notes field contains the required details: African American, approx 6'1", 185 lbs, short black hair, dark blue hoodie, white sneakers, and skull tattoo on left forearm.

task_completion.description: Submit and create the BOLO record
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed indicating the BOLO was created, or the newly created BOLO for Marcus Holloway is visible in the active BOLOs list/dashboard.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with OpenCAD
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions take place within a web browser navigating to http://localhost, rather than using terminal commands like curl to send HTTP requests.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenCAD application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine OpenCAD graphical user interface with proper styling and form elements, not a text editor or basic HTML mockup.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database insertion scripts
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL commands or Python scripts being executed to bypass the UI and insert the BOLO directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified BOLO details to check: First Name: 'Marcus', Last Name: 'Holloway', Gender: 'Male', Location: 'Vinewood Blvd'. The description must contain the following verified keywords: 'hoodie', 'tattoo', '185', '6'1', 'blue', and 'sneakers'.
